violations.text: Various items were observed held at 46-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods were stored on top of covered pans/over fill line of food in the flip top prep unit overnight. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of items at the time of inspection. Foods to not be stored overfill line in flip top prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. Non-food contact surfaces to be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
